# Example showing stdin command usage
#
# This test uses the built-in echo command to read from stdin

# Set stdin content directly
setstdin "Hello from stdin"
cat
stdout 'Hello from stdin'

# Verify that stdin is cleared after the command
cat
! stdout 'Hello from stdin'

# Use explicit JSON content
setstdin {"name":"example","value":123}
cat
stdout '{"name":"example","value":123}'
